title: The Goa, Daman and Diu (Administration) Act, 1962
full_text: The Goa, Daman and Diu (Administration) Act, 1962 गोवा, दमण और दीव (प्रशासन) अधिनियम, 1962 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196201 Act Number: 01 Enactment Date: 1962-03-27 Act Year: 1962 Short Title: The Goa, Daman and Diu (Administration) Act, 1962 Hindi Title: गोवा, दमण और दीव (प्रशासन) अधिनियम, 1962 Long Title: An Act to provide for the administration of the Union territory of Goa, Daman and Diu and for matters connected therewith.
